faqs.question: How do I book an appointment at Divine Medical Centre?
faqs.answer: Use the appointment button or call 9508655664. The team will help you choose a convenient consultation time.

faqs.question: What services does Divine Medical Centre offer?
faqs.answer: Divine Medical Centre supports patients with General Consultation, Preventive Care, Health Checkups, Follow-up Care.

faqs.question: Can I ask questions before visiting?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can call, email, or use WhatsApp to ask about availability, services, and the best next step for your needs.

faqs.question: Where is the clinic located?
faqs.answer: Divine Medical Centre is located at Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India.

aboutText: Divine Medical Centre offers accessible, friendly, and reliable healthcare support for everyday medical needs.
contactBlurb: Get in touch to schedule an appointment or ask a question.
